text.title: ba-requirements-mgmt Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ba-requirements-mgmt as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated effort estimates that are suspiciously round numbers (4, 8, 16 hours).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a calibration prompt: pass historical CR effort data and require the agent to anchor its estimate to a similar past CR by ID.

failure-mode.description: Two requirements with opposing acceptance criteria in the same hierarchy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Conflicts indicate structural confusion or unresolved trade-offs; the conflict itself is the signal that the hierarchy needs simplification.
